mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erotica_story_states (story_id, payload, version, updated_at) VALUES ( #{storyId}, #{payload, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{version}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (story_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE erotica_story_states SET payload = #{payload, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}::jsonb, version = version + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE story_id = #{storyId} AND version = #{version}
